mapper.select: SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.img_url AS imgUrl, COUNT(review_no) AS reviewCount FROM product p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.product_no = r.product_no AND r.is_paid = 1 WHERE p.company_no = ( SELECT company_no FROM company c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.img_url AS imgUrl, COUNT(review_no) AS reviewCount FROM product p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.product_no = r.product_no AND r.is_paid = 0 WHERE p.company_no = ( SELECT company_no FROM company c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC

SELECT r.reg_date AS regDate, r.img_description AS imgDescription, r.is_paid AS isPaid, r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.user_id AS userId, r.company_no AS companyNo, r.product_no AS productNo, r.rating AS rating, r.content AS content, r.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, r.updated AS updated FROM review r WHERE is_paid = 1 AND product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC

=======
SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.img_url AS imgUrl, COUNT(review_no) AS reviewCount FROM product p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.product_no = r.product_no AND r.is_paid = 1 WHERE p.company_no = ( SELECT company_no FROM company c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC
SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.img_url AS imgUrl, COUNT(review_no) AS reviewCount FROM product p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.product_no = r.product_no AND r.is_paid = 0 WHERE p.company_no = ( SELECT company_no FROM company c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(company_no) AS reviewCount FROM review r WHERE r.is_paid = 1 AND updated = 1 AND r.company_no = ( SELECT company_no FROM company c WHERE user_id = #{userId} )
SELECT COUNT(company_no) AS reviewCount FROM review r WHERE r.is_paid = 0 AND updated = 1 AND r.company_no = ( SELECT company_no FROM company c WHERE user_id = #{userId} )
SELECT r.reg_date AS regDate, r.img_description AS imgDescription, r.is_paid AS isPaid, r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.user_id AS userId, r.company_no AS companyNo, r.product_no AS productNo, r.rating AS rating, r.content AS content, r.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, r.updated AS updated FROM review r WHERE is_paid = 1 AND product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
>>>>>>> branch 'dev_' of https://github.com/limhyojin3/SpringProjectTeam3.git SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.content AS content, r.user_id AS userId, r.rating AS rating, r.updated AS updated, r.reg_date AS regDate FROM review r WHERE r.is_paid = 0 AND r.product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
UPDATE review SET updated = 0 WHERE DATEDIFF(NOW(), reg_date) >= 3 AND updated = 1
